column67: Client Remarks Stunning Fully Renovated Family Home in One of Richmond Hill's Most Desirable Communities! Offering approximately 2,849 sq ft above grade with 9 ft ceilings on the main floor, this beautifully upgraded home features new hardwood floors, modern tiles, smooth ceilings on the main level, designer lighting, a completely renovated chef-inspired kitchen with quartz waterfall countertop, marble backsplash, and top-of-the-line appliances including induction cooktop, steam pro-bake oven, and Samsung Family Hub refrigerator. Luxurious primary ensuite fully renovated in 2026. Enjoy unobstructed park views and exceptional privacy with no neighbours behind, backing directly onto a park and mature trees with walk-out to a large deck and fully fenced backyard. Professionally finished walk-out basement includes two separate apartments (2-bedroom + 1-bedroom), ideal for extended family or excellent rental income potential that can help cover a significant portion of the mortgage. Located in the top-ranked Bayview Secondary School district and close to parks, community centres, transit, shopping, and major amenities. Rare opportunity to own a turnkey home in a prestigious multimillion-dollar neighbourhood.
